title: Degraded-mode trip / exit events + dwell time
description: Phase 13 DegradedModeState surface. Tracks the bot's fail-soft transitions: when the SmartMonsterDriver downshifts to deterministic fallback (entered), when the trip-reason flips while still degraded (reason_changed), and when the bot recovers (exited). KPIs: time-in-degraded-mode <5% rolling 24h; mean dwell <60s; trip frequency <3/hour sustained.
query_recipe:
Phoenix UI → Project 'eldritch-degraded' → Filter on structured-log events emitted by src/eldritch_dm/observability/degraded_mode.py:
  1. `eldritch.degraded_mode.entered` — count over time, grouped by `reason` (line chart). Healthy: spikes during upstream MLX outages, baseline near zero.
  2. `eldritch.degraded_mode.reason_changed` — count over time (single series). Indicates the bot stayed degraded long enough for the root cause to mutate; investigate if non-zero.
  3. `eldritch.degraded_mode.exited` — distribution of `dwell_seconds` attribute (histogram or p50/p95). Targets: p50<30s, p95<120s. Long tails indicate the recovery probe is mis-tuned.
  4. Current-state gauge: most-recent event per (process_id) — if the latest event is `entered` or `reason_changed`, the bot is still degraded. (Compute in the UI by sorting events DESC and picking head.)
  5. Total time-in-degraded: `sum(dwell_seconds)` from exited events over the time window / window_seconds → fraction. Alert above 5%.
